title: Virentia
description: A dimension where plants evolved into animals.
body:
This mod adds a dimension with some creatures and blocks.

This dimension is meant as a alternative source to materials used in my other mods. Most blocks can be turned into materials(such as iron, redstone or silver) or be used in building.The creatures are either plants or living earth and are categorized into 4 factions:

-Fruits(sentient)

-Vegetables(wild)

-insects(feral)

-golems(ancient)

The mod currently adds:

-1 dimension(with 4 biomes)

-3 wood types

-20 creatures

-22 food items

-2 metals with armor and tools(silver and steel)

Made with MCreator
